title: Elbow Grease Ultra Max Liquid Dishwasher Tablets | Tough on Grease & Brilliant Shine | Prevents Limescale | Powerful All-In-1 Clean (Lemon, 18 Tabs)
features: TOUGH ON GREASE: Built to take on thick grease and dried food without fuss. Perfect after a big roast, frying pans and oily trays come out clean with no soaking needed. Everyday washes feel easier when tough messes are handled first time.

NO PRE-RINSE, LESS HASSLE: Skip the sink and save time after busy family meals. Plates can go straight from table to dishwasher without rinsing. The powerful liquid formula gets to work straight away, even on stubborn leftovers.

BRILLIANT SHINE: Enjoy glasses that look clear and plates that shine after every wash. Ideal for wine glasses after guests or everyday mugs that cloud easily. The result is a streak-free finish that looks clean and fresh.
ALL-IN-ONE TAB: These dish washing pods combine cleaning, grease cutting and shine in one tab. There is no measuring or mess to worry about. Ideal for quick resets after busy weekdays or weekends.
HELPS PREVENT LIMESCALE: Supports dishwasher performance with every wash. Regular use helps prevent limescale build-up over time. This keeps the dishwasher running smoothly and efficiently.

RELIABLE STAIN REMOVAL: Baked-on sauces, cheesy dishes and dried cereal are tackled with ease. Even heavily used cookware comes out looking refreshed. One simple wash delivers consistent results day after day.
RESEALABLE STORAGE: Supplied in a practical resealable bag to keep tabs protected. Easy to store in cupboards, under sinks or utility spaces. Everything stays tidy and ready for the next load.

EFFECTIVE ON SHORT AND ECO CYCLES: Delivers strong cleaning even at lower temperatures. Ideal when running quick or eco-friendly programmes. Great results are achieved without long or intensive cycles.
FRESH LEMON SCENT: A light lemon fragrance leaves the dishwasher smelling clean after each cycle. It adds a fresh lift to the kitchen without being overpowering.

PACK SIZES TO SUIT EVERY HOME: Available in 18 or 30 tab packs to match different routines. Smaller households can stock lightly, while busy kitchens stay prepared. A flexible option for everyday dishwashing needs.
description: Product Description Elbow Grease Ultra Max Liquid Dishwasher Tablets bring serious cleaning power to everyday washes, making light work of heavy grease and baked-on food. These advanced dishwasher tablets combine the strength of dishwasher liquid with the ease of modern dish washing pods, giving reliable results without the need to pre-rinse. Simply place a tab in the dishwasher, load up, and let Ultra Max do the hard work. Designed for busy kitchens, these powerful dishwasher tabs tackle stubborn stains, dried sauces and greasy pans in one smooth cycle. The ultra-concentrated liquid formula cuts through grime fast, helping dishes come out spotless with a brilliant shine. Glasses stay clear and streak-free, plates feel squeaky clean, and cutlery looks ready for the table straight from the dishwasher. Elbow Grease Ultra Max dishwasher liquid tabs also help care for the machine itself. Each wash supports cleaner performance and helps prevent limescale build-up, keeping the dishwasher running efficiently for longer. With no pre-rinse needed, less water is wasted and washing up becomes quicker and easier. The fresh lemon scent leaves the dishwasher smelling clean after every cycle, adding a burst of freshness to the kitchen. Supplied in a practical resealable bag, these dishwasher tablets stay protected and easy to store. Available in 18 tab or 30 tab packs, there is a size to suit smaller households or busy family kitchens. For dependable results, fewer steps and a shine that speaks for itself, Elbow Grease Ultra Max dish washing pods deliver powerful, all-in-one cleaning that fits perfectly into everyday life. Ingredients Sodium Percarbonate; Oxirane, 2-methyl-, polymer with oxirane, mono(2-propylheptyl) ether. Contains amongst other ingredients: 15-30% Non Ionic Surfactants, 5-15% Oxygen based bleaching agents, <5% Phosphonates, Enzymes (Subtilisin, Amylase), Parfum. Directions Place one tablet per wash into the dry dispenser. If it does not fit, place in the cutlery basket. Use a standard cycle. Do not select a pre-wash programme. In hard water areas, improve performance by adding dishwasher salt. See more
